question: What is the average invoice amount for customers located in New York?
gold_sql:
SELECT AVG(i.total) AS average_invoice_amount
FROM invoice i
JOIN customer c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE c.city = 'New York';

question: Identify the top 5 customers by total purchase amount within the last six months.
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, SUM(i.total) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM customer c
JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
WHERE i.invoice_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: How many unique customers purchased tracks from the Rock genre in the past quarter?
gold_sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id) AS unique_customers_rock_genre_past_quarter
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
JOIN 
    invoice_line il ON i.invoice_id = il.invoice_id
JOIN 
    track t ON il.track_id = t.track_id
JOIN 
    genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id
WHERE 
    g.name = 'Rock'
    AND i.invoice_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months'
    AND c.country = 'USA'  -- Assuming North America region means USA; adjust if needed

question: Which genre has the highest average track duration and what is that average time?
gold_sql:
SELECT g.name AS genre_name, AVG(t.milliseconds) / 1000.0 AS avg_duration_seconds
FROM genre g
JOIN track t ON g.genre_id = t.genre_id
GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.name
ORDER BY avg_duration_seconds DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Can you show the number of albums released by each artist, sorted from the most to the least?
gold_sql:
SELECT a.name AS artist_name, COUNT(al.album_id) AS album_count
FROM artist a
LEFT JOIN album al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id
GROUP BY a.name
ORDER BY album_count DESC;

question: What is the total size in bytes of all tracks grouped by media type, and which media type has the largest total?
gold_sql:
SELECT mt.name AS media_type, SUM(t.bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM track t
JOIN media_type mt ON t.media_type_id = mt.media_type_id
GROUP BY mt.name
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC;

question: For each artist, what is the count of distinct genres they have tracks in, ordered by the highest genre count first?
gold_sql:
SELECT ar.name AS artist_name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.genre_id) AS distinct_genre_count
FROM artist ar
JOIN album al ON ar.artist_id = al.artist_id
JOIN track t ON al.album_id = t.album_id
GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name
ORDER BY distinct_genre_count DESC;

question: Which playlists contain the greatest number of tracks and how many tracks do they have?
gold_sql:
SELECT p.playlist_id, p.name, COUNT(pt.track_id) AS track_count
FROM playlist p
JOIN playlist_track pt ON p.playlist_id = pt.playlist_id
GROUP BY p.playlist_id, p.name
HAVING COUNT(pt.track_id) = (
    SELECT MAX(track_count) FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(track_id) AS track_count
        FROM playlist_track
        GROUP BY playlist_id
    ) AS counts
)
